creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 225473
GO_PSEUDOVERSION.patch

Sometimes Golang servers list packages with different versions compared to versions projects are released with. Such versions are called pseudoversions. [1]

URLs like this one:
> https://index.golang.org/index?limit=2000&since=2021-05-28T01:21:42.994935Z
can be used to retrieve the list of all Golang packages and versions as they are listed on Golang servers.

==References==
[1] https://golang.org/ref/mod#pseudo-versions
